slices.title: Add CRUD actions to mobile navigation mockup
slices.jtbd: When viewing the mobile layout, I want to see direct create, edit, and delete actions in the bottom navigation bar, so that I can easily access these operations.
slices.acceptanceCriteria:
Given the file design/approved/20260721003552-mockup/mockup.html, When rendered in a mobile viewport, Then the bottom navigation bar includes visible buttons for create, edit, and delete actions.
Given the mobile navigation bar, When the search functionality is active, Then the create, edit, and delete action buttons remain accessible.
slices.sixSigmaMetric: Increase the count of visible direct CRUD action buttons on the mobile bottom navigation bar from 0 to 3.
